title: HTML to Text Cleaner Input
description: Extract clean text from HTML by removing JavaScript, CSS, and tracking tags. Perfect for RAG pipelines, LLM training data, and AI agent workflows.

urls.title: URLs to Process
urls.description: Array of URLs to fetch and process (alternative to raw_payload)

includeMetadata.title: Include Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Extract and return metadata (language, processing time, script removal stats)

removeScripts.title: Remove Scripts
removeScripts.description: Strip JavaScript and tracking scripts from HTML

removeStyles.title: Remove Styles
removeStyles.description: Strip CSS and style tags from HTML

extractMentions.title: Extract Mentions
extractMentions.description: Extract @mentions from text (for social media content)

extractHashtags.title: Extract Hashtags
extractHashtags.description: Extract #hashtags from text (for social media content)
